title: YES4QUALITY Dog Bite Tug Toy - 30x9cm, Green - Durable Pull Toy with 2 Strong Handles - Tough Nylon Bite Pillow for Small to Medium Dogs - Ideal for Tug of War, Fetch, K9, Puppy Training & Play
features: INTERACTIVE PLAYTIME - This bite tug toy is a valuable training tool for obedience, agility and other activities; It helps build prey drive, improves focus and strengthens the bond between you and your dog, making training sessions more effective and enjoyable

PREMIUM QUALITY - Crafted for engaging play, this dog bite tug toy is made from tough nylon and cotton blend, reinforced w/ double stitching for added durability; Designed for endless fun and activity for your furry friend

COMFORTABLE & SECURE - This 30 x 9 centimetres tug toy features two soft yet sturdy handles that offer a comfortable and secure grip for both you and your dog; Say goodbye to rope burns and cuts, and enjoy playtime without any discomfort

INCLUDES - 1 Tug toy for small to medium dog breeds; Versatile training tool offers countless hours of entertainment, from tug of war and fetch to interactive play, training exercises and beyond, keeping your pup engaged and active

SAFE & RELIABLE - While this tug toy is built tough, it's essential to remember that no toy is indestructible; Never leave your dog unattended with the toy and prevent them from biting the handles for their safety; This dog toy is perfect for big puppies and medium to large breeds such as German Shepherds, Belgian Malinois, Pitbulls and more
description: Product Description Premium Pet Products At Yes4Quality, we are passionate about making high standard dog toys & pet products. We offer a wide range of dog toys made using premium-grade materials to ensure a happy and healthy lifestyle for your beloved friend. Trusted Safety Yes4Quality is a trusted US-based company that meticulously designs and rigorously tests all dog toys, ensuring that they meet the highest safety standards. Our commitment is to make products that are 100% safe & reliable for your furry companion. Fun Playtime Our mission is to develop fun dog toys that bring joy and endless entertainment to our furry friends. We understand that life gets busy and sometimes we don't have the energy to play with our pup. However, our dog toys keep them engaged throughout the day. More Than Pets! Dogs are Family! Our wide collection of pet products not only provide countless hours of fun but also assists in training your dogs and providing them with healthy exercise that improves their overall health, wellness, mood & energy levels. Dog Toys Keep Your Dog Happy & Healthy! Every dog deserves the best love & care. So why wait? Browse our extensive collection of pet products and unleash endless fun and happiness for your beloved pet! Join the ever-growing community of delighted pet owners and choose Yes4Quality for pawsome adventures!
